cases.title: TS-21d: Empty deployment bootstrap — needsSetup true then POST first-admin creates single TrainingOfficeAdmin
preconditions: PostgreSQL database with User.count = 0 (no seed users)
API running at /api/v1 with no session cookie
steps: GET /api/v1/setup/status without authentication
Assert HTTP 200 and body { needsSetup: true }
POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin with valid institutionalId, displayName, email, and password (≥8 chars per VAL-03)
Assert HTTP 201 Created and Set-Cookie wecheck_session present
GET /api/v1/auth/me using session cookie and assert role TrainingOfficeAdmin
GET /api/v1/setup/status and assert needsSetup false
cases.expected: Testing-plan TS-21d and BR-13 satisfied: empty deployment reports needsSetup true; first-admin POST creates exactly one TrainingOfficeAdmin with session; needsSetup flips to false

cases.title: Tag-specific integration: bootstrap allowed only when User.count = 0
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database with users table empty
identity-auth SetupService wired to UserRepository per module breakdown
steps: Assert users table row count === 0
Invoke SetupService.getStatus() and assert needsSetup === true
Invoke SetupService.createFirstAdmin with valid DTO and assert success
Assert users table count === 1
Invoke SetupService.getStatus() and assert needsSetup === false
Invoke SetupService.createFirstAdmin again with different valid DTO
Assert SetupAlreadyComplete domain error thrown and users count remains 1
cases.expected: Tag-specific integration hint satisfied: bootstrap permitted only at User.count = 0; after first user exists createFirstAdmin rejected per BR-13

cases.title: SetupService.createFirstAdmin persists admin, auth session, and enforces one-time bootstrap transaction
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with User.count = 0
SetupService.createFirstAdmin available with password hashing per UserService
steps: Invoke createFirstAdmin with valid DTO (institutionalId, displayName, email, password)
Query users table and assert exactly one row with role TrainingOfficeAdmin
Query auth_sessions table and assert session row linked to new userId
Invoke createFirstAdmin again with different valid DTO
Assert SetupAlreadyComplete domain error and users table count remains 1
cases.expected: Module-integration: bootstrap creates exactly one admin user and session in single transaction; repeat attempt rejected at service layer per BR-13 scope

cases.title: Deployment gate transitions needsSetup true to false after first admin commit
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with beforeState: User.count = 0 and needsSetup true
SetupService.createFirstAdmin transactional path available
steps: Record beforeState: setup status needsSetup true; users count 0
Execute createFirstAdmin transaction to completion
Record afterState: users count 1; role TrainingOfficeAdmin
Assert needsSetup false on subsequent status check
Attempt createFirstAdmin and assert SetupAlreadyComplete without rollback
cases.expected: State transition: deployment moves from bootstrap-required (needsSetup true) to login-available (needsSetup false) after exactly one admin user committed per BR-13

cases.title: GET /api/v1/setup/status returns 200 JSON with needsSetup boolean per API design §2.0
preconditions: Empty database fixture (needsSetup true) and post-bootstrap fixture (needsSetup false) available
steps: Send GET /api/v1/setup/status without authentication on empty DB
Assert HTTP 200 OK and Content-Type application/json
Assert response body { needsSetup: true }
Switch to post-bootstrap fixture with one admin user
Send GET /api/v1/setup/status
Assert HTTP 200 and body { needsSetup: false }
cases.expected: HTTP contract for setup status endpoint returns 200 with needsSetup flag reflecting User.count per BR-13 condition

cases.title: POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin returns 201 with session cookie on empty DB
preconditions: Empty database; no session cookie
Valid setup payload per validation rules §3.1a
steps: Send POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin with JSON body { institutionalId, displayName, email, password }
Assert HTTP 201 Created
Assert Set-Cookie header contains wecheck_session HttpOnly cookie (same as login per API design §2.0)
Assert response body includes user DTO with role TrainingOfficeAdmin and no password fields
GET /api/v1/auth/me with session cookie and assert authenticated admin identity
cases.expected: HTTP 201 contract for successful bootstrap; session cookie issued identically to POST /auth/login success path per BR-13 outcome

cases.title: POST /setup/first-admin returns 403 SetupAlreadyComplete when bootstrap already complete
preconditions: Database with User.count >= 1; needsSetup false
No valid bootstrap window open per BR-13 exceptions (none)
steps: GET /api/v1/setup/status and assert needsSetup false
POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin with valid new-admin payload without session
Assert HTTP 403 Forbidden
Assert response errorCode SetupAlreadyComplete per API design §2.0
Query users table and assert User.count unchanged
cases.expected: Bootstrap endpoint denied after first user exists; repeat POST rejected with SetupAlreadyComplete per BR-13 outcome and AC-17c

cases.title: Bootstrap blocked when any user record exists (non-admin Student seed)
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with one existing Student user row (User.count = 1, role Student)
No TrainingOfficeAdmin exists
steps: Invoke SetupService.getStatus() and assert needsSetup === false
Invoke SetupService.createFirstAdmin with valid admin DTO
Assert SetupAlreadyComplete domain error thrown
Query users table and assert count remains 1 with role Student unchanged
cases.expected: BR-13 exception clause (none): bootstrap unavailable when any user record exists, not only when admin exists

cases.title: AC-17d: Duplicate email or institutionalId on setup returns validation error; no user created
preconditions: Empty database (User.count = 0); needsSetup true
Setup payload with duplicate email or institutionalId
steps: POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin with duplicate email and valid other fields
Assert HTTP 422 ValidationFailed with duplicate email field detail
Assert no user row created in users table
POST with duplicate institutionalId and unique email
Assert HTTP 422 with duplicate institutionalId detail and User.count remains 0
cases.expected: AC-17d boundary: duplicate email or institutional ID on bootstrap rejected with field validation; deployment remains in needsSetup true state

cases.title: Repeat POST /setup/first-admin after bootstrap returns 403 SetupAlreadyComplete (not 201 or 422)
preconditions: Database with User.count >= 1 from prior bootstrap
needsSetup false
steps: POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin with valid institutionalId, displayName, email, password
Assert HTTP 403 Forbidden (not 201, not 422)
Assert response errorCode SetupAlreadyComplete per API design §2.0
Assert Vietnamese user-facing message present
Verify User.count unchanged after rejected request
cases.expected: Bootstrap repeat boundary: SetupAlreadyComplete at HTTP 403 when deployment already has users per BR-13 and AC-17c

cases.title: Tag-specific e2e: concurrent bootstrap requests produce exactly one TrainingOfficeAdmin
preconditions: Empty PostgreSQL database (User.count = 0)
Two or more concurrent valid setup payloads with unique emails and institutionalIds
steps: Fire parallel POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin requests against empty DB
Collect HTTP status codes from all responses
Assert exactly one response is HTTP 201 Created with session cookie
Assert all other responses are HTTP 403 SetupAlreadyComplete or conflict rejection
Query users table and assert User.count === 1 with role TrainingOfficeAdmin
GET /api/v1/setup/status and assert needsSetup false
cases.expected: Tag-specific e2e hint satisfied: BR-13 exactly-one bootstrap invariant holds under concurrent requests; no duplicate admin rows

cases.title: Parallel SetupService.createFirstAdmin calls on empty DB create at most one admin
preconditions: Empty PostgreSQL database
SetupService with transactional User.count guard and row-level or advisory lock
steps: Fire parallel SetupService.createFirstAdmin invocations with distinct valid DTOs
Collect success and failure outcomes from all invocations
Assert exactly one invocation succeeds and returns admin user plus session
Assert all other invocations throw SetupAlreadyComplete
Query users table and assert User.count === 1 with role TrainingOfficeAdmin
cases.expected: Integration concurrency: exactly one bootstrap transaction permitted per BR-13 scope under parallel module calls

cases.title: Fresh deploy: all routes except /setup redirect to setup; login link hidden when needsSetup true
preconditions: Web app running with empty database (needsSetup true)
No session cookie in browser
steps: Navigate browser to / (root route)
Assert URL redirects to /setup per BR-13 route guard
Navigate to /login and assert redirect to /setup (or login link hidden/disabled on /setup)
Navigate to /admin/users and assert redirect to /setup
Assert SetupAdminForm visible with Vietnamese fields (Mã cán bộ, Họ và tên, Email, Mật khẩu)
cases.expected: BR-13 outcome: while User.count = 0 all routes except /setup redirect to /setup; login unavailable until bootstrap completes per AC-17a

cases.title: Successful setup form submission establishes session and redirects to /admin hub
preconditions: Web app with empty database (needsSetup true)
Valid setup credentials prepared
steps: Navigate browser to /setup
Fill institutionalId, displayName, email, and password fields with valid values
Submit SetupAdminForm
Assert POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin succeeds (network tab or outcome UI)
Assert browser navigates to /admin hub per BR-13 outcome
Assert AdminLayout chrome visible (e.g. Trang chủ sidebar item)
cases.expected: BR-13 outcome: first admin created, authenticated session established, redirect to /admin hub per AC-17b

cases.title: App boot polls GET /setup/status and gates routes until needsSetup false
preconditions: Web app with empty database (needsSetup true)
Browser devtools network panel available
steps: Navigate browser to / and observe network requests on app boot
Assert GET /api/v1/setup/status is polled and returns needsSetup true
Assert client route guard redirects to /setup before protected routes render
Complete bootstrap via setup form submission
Reload browser and assert GET /setup/status returns needsSetup false
Assert root route no longer redirects to /setup
cases.expected: BR-13 trigger satisfied: GET /api/v1/setup/status polled on app boot; route gating follows needsSetup flag until bootstrap complete

cases.title: After bootstrap /setup unavailable — redirects to login; root no longer routes to setup
preconditions: Bootstrap already complete (needsSetup false)
Browser has no active session
steps: Navigate browser directly to /setup
Assert redirect to /login OR forbidden state without SetupAdminForm
Navigate to / from unauthenticated state
Assert redirect to /login (not /setup) when needsSetup false
Assert no setup form fields rendered on any attempted route
cases.expected: AC-17c and BR-13 post-bootstrap outcome: /setup returns 403 or redirects to login; repeat bootstrap unavailable in UI
